reconciliation.horizontal: A provisional fixed-grid inversion was rejected when the 3x semantic protocol showed it reversed visible gaze. The original coefficients were restored, the complete rows rerendered, and three new blind reviewers unanimously passed the final horizontal pair.
reconciliation.vertical: The original vertical coefficients were likewise restored; three new blind reviewers unanimously passed the final vertical pair, and the rendered control sign is correct.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: restored original horizontal and vertical eye/head coefficients after semantic remediation
